Clenched Fist.name: 쥔 주먹 - Clenched Fist
Clenched Fist.description: The hand strikes 크리처 하나 or object within 5 feet of it. Make a melee spell Attack for the hand using your game Statistics. 명중 시, 대상은 4d8 force damage를 받습니다.

Interposing Hand.name: 가로막는 손 - Interposing Hand
Interposing Hand.description: The hand interposes itself between you and a creature you choose until you give the hand a different command. The hand moves to stay between you and the target, providing you with half cover against the target. The target can't move through the hand's space if its Strength score is less than or equal to the hand's Strength score. If its Strength score is higher than the hand's Strength score, the target can move toward you through the hand's space, but that space is difficult terrain for the target.

Bite.name: 물기 - Bite
Bite.description:
근접 무기 공격:+5 명중,, 5 ft., 목표 하나. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage.

If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

The Dire Wolf attacks with its Bite. If the target is a creature, it must make a Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

Keen Hearing and Smell.name: 예리한 청각과 후각 - Keen Hearing and Smell

Pack Tactics.name: 무리 전술 - Pack Tactics
Pack Tactics.description: [[lookup @name lowercase]] 의 아군이 하나 이상 한 크리처의 주변 5ft 이내에 있으며 해당 아군이 행동불능 상태가 아닌 경우, 해당 크리처에 대한 [[lookup @name lowercase]] 의 공격 굴림에는 유리함이 적용됩니다.
